basic_details.job_title: NIT Andhra Pradesh Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Posts
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Technology Andhra Pradesh
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Andhra Pradesh (NIT Andhra Pradesh) Adhoc Faculty Notification 2026 has been released on the official website nitandhra.ac.in. A total of various vacancies have been announced through the NIT Andhra Pradesh Adhoc Faculty Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech/B.E. and M.Tech/M.E. or equivalent in respective branches, or Ph.D. for some positions.
qualification.details: Adhoc Faculty in Civil Engineering: B.Tech/B.E. (First Class) and M.Tech/M.E. or equivalent (First Class) in respective branch or allied branches. Adhoc Faculty in Chemical Engineering: B.Tech/B.E. (First Class) and M.Tech/M.E. or equivalent (First Class) in respective branch or allied branches. Adhoc Faculty in Computer Science and Engineering: B.Tech/B.E. (First Class) and M.Tech/M.E. or equivalent (First Class) in respective branch or allied branches. Adhoc Faculty in Electrical Engineering: B.Tech/B.E. (First Class) and M.Tech/M.E. or equivalent (First Class) in respective branch or allied branches. Adhoc Faculty in Electronics & Communications Engineering: B.Tech/B.E. (First Class) and M.Tech/M.E. or equivalent (First Class) in respective branch or allied branches. Adhoc Faculty in Mechanical Engineering: B.Tech/B.E. (First Class) and M.Tech/M.E. or equivalent (First Class) in respective branch or allied branches. Adhoc Faculty in Metallurgical and Materials Engineering: B.Tech/B.E. (First Class) and M.Tech/M.E. or equivalent (First Class) in respective branch or allied branches. Adhoc Faculty in Biotechnology: B.Tech. (First Class) and M.Tech. or equivalent (First Class) in Biotechnology, OR B.Tech. in Chemical Engineering (First Class) and M.Tech. in Biotechnology/Chemical Engineering (First Class), OR B.Sc. (First Class), M.Sc. (First Class), and M.Tech in Biotechnology (First Class). Adhoc Faculty in School of Sciences (Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry): UG Degree (First Class), PG Degree (First Class) in relevant discipline, and Ph.D.** in relevant or equivalent discipline. Adhoc Faculty in School of Humanities (English): UG Degree (First Class), PG Degree (First Class) in relevant discipline, and Ph.D.** in relevant or equivalent discipline. Adhoc Faculty in Schools of Humanities (Management): B.Tech. (any branch of Engineering) (First Class) and MBA (Full time) (First Class), OR Bachelor's Degree (any discipline) (First Class) with M.Com.* (Full-time) (First Class) and MBA (Full time) (First Class).

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 09-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIT Andhra Pradesh to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Adhoc Faculty positions at NIT Andhra Pradesh?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form is 09-06-2026. Candidates are advised to apply well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum qualifications required for the Adhoc Faculty posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualifications generally include a B.Tech/B.E. and M.Tech/M.E. or equivalent in the respective branches. Some positions, particularly in Schools of Sciences and Humanities, require a Ph.D.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Adhoc Faculty positions?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 55,000 to Rs. 70,000 per month, depending on the qualification. Candidates with M.Tech/MBA will receive Rs. 55,000, while those with a Ph.D. will receive Rs. 70,000.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the Adhoc Faculty positions?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the provided link on the official recruitment portal of NIT Andhra Pradesh. Ensure all details are accurate and documents are uploaded correctly.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the available information, no application fee is mentioned for this recruitment drive. Candidates should verify this in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Adhoc Faculty roles?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves an offline lecture demonstration followed by an offline interview. Candidates are evaluated based on their teaching skills and subject knowledge.

faq.question: Q7. Are there any specific age limits for the Adhoc Faculty positions?
faq.answer: The provided data does not specify age limits. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any age criteria or relaxation details.

faq.question: Q8. Which departments are recruiting Adhoc Faculty?
faq.answer: NIT Andhra Pradesh is recruiting Adhoc Faculty in various departments including Civil Engineering, Chemical Engineering, Computer Science and Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communications Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Metallurgical and Materials Engineering, Biotechnology, School of Sciences (Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry), and School of Humanities (English, Management).

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or temporary position?
faq.answer: The job type for these Adhoc Faculty positions is temporary, intended for the Academic Year 2026-27.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification and the online application link are available in the "Important Links" section of this article. You can also visit the official website of NIT Andhra Pradesh for more information.
